ItacPersonItem.Pseudonym: Attizzato Accademico Ferrarese | Il Verrato | Orlando Pescetti
ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1601. Principe of the Umoristi in 1611. Promoted the membership of, among others, Quarengo, Arlotti, and Stigliani.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
